hero.secondary: Choose the type of appointment that suits you, then select a time slot.

events.sectionSubtitle: Select the service that best fits your needs. You will then be able to choose a time slot.

info.secondary: Everything you need to know about booking an appointment.

cartes.title: Email confirmation
cartes.text: You will receive an email with all the details and a link to modify or cancel.

cartes.title: Free cancellation
cartes.text: You can cancel or reschedule your appointment at any time via the link in the email.

cartes.title: Time zone
cartes.text: Available time slots are displayed in your local time zone, automatically detected.

auth.title: Login required
auth.message: You must be logged in to book an appointment.

confirmation.title: Appointment booking sent!
confirmation.emailSent: An email [Pending validation] has been sent to the address {email}. It will appear in two or three minutes.

annulation.message: Your appointment has been cancelled. You can book a new one below.
